global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with abstract shapes and clear promotional messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting fast signup for a financial service.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire ad space, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in the ad, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape is positioned slightly above the center, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text reads 'Track every euro' with a smaller tagline below it, emphasizing the service's benefits.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The 'NovaPay' logo appears in a prominent position at the top left, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad displays 'Watch now' in bold text, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and abstract, NovaPay, Track every euro, Watch now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Track every euro, Fast signup, instant card, NovaPay, Watch now
